---
title: "Appendix — Manuscript Title"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ecology.csl
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---
```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

# Appendix A — Supplementary Methods

*Additional methodological details that support the main text but would interrupt its flow.*

## A1 — Simulation Parameter Details
```{r param-table}
# Display full parameter grid
# params <- read_csv(here("outputs", "simulation_results", "param_grid.csv"))
# knitr::kable(params, caption = "Full simulation parameter grid.")
```

## A2 — Model Equations

*Mathematical details, derivations, or extended model description.*

---

# Appendix B — Supplementary Results

## B1 — Sensitivity Analyses
```{r fig-sensitivity}
#| label: fig-s1
#| fig-cap: "Supplementary Figure S1. Caption here."

# knitr::include_graphics(here("figures", "figS1_sensitivity.png"))
```

## B2 — Additional Figures and Tables

---

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
